mapper.sql: id, word, phonetic_uk, phonetic_us, part_of_speech, definition_zh, definition_en, frequency_level, word_list, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, related_words, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT w.*, sr.status AS study_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_content_links cl WHERE cl.target_type = 'WORD' AND cl.target_id = w.id) AS link_count FROM ielts_words w LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'WORD' AND sr.content_id = w.id
ORDER BY w.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_words w LEFT JOIN ielts_study_records sr ON sr.content_type = 'WORD' AND sr.content_id = w.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_words (id, word, phonetic_uk, phonetic_us, part_of_speech, definition_zh, definition_en, frequency_level, word_list, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, related_words, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{word}, #{phoneticUk}, #{phoneticUs}, #{partOfSpeech}, #{definitionZh}, #{definitionEn}, #{frequencyLevel}, #{wordList}, #{difficulty}, #{skillTags}, #{topicTags}, #{relatedWords}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ielts_words SET word = #{word}, phonetic_uk = #{phoneticUk}, phonetic_us = #{phoneticUs}, part_of_speech = #{partOfSpeech}, definition_zh = #{definitionZh}, definition_en = #{definitionEn}, frequency_level = #{frequencyLevel}, word_list = #{wordList}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, skill_tags = #{skillTags}, topic_tags = #{topicTags}, related_words = #{relatedWords}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ielts_words (id, word, phonetic_uk, phonetic_us, part_of_speech, definition_zh, definition_en, frequency_level, word_list, difficulty, skill_tags, topic_tags, related_words, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{w.id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{w.word}, #{w.phoneticUk}, #{w.phoneticUs}, #{w.partOfSpeech}, #{w.definitionZh}, #{w.definitionEn}, #{w.frequencyLevel}, #{w.wordList}, #{w.difficulty}, #{w.skillTags}, #{w.topicTags}, #{w.relatedWords}, #{w.createdAt}, #{w.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT w.* FROM ielts_words w WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ielts_study_records sr WHERE sr.content_type = 'WORD' AND sr.content_id = w.id ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ielts_examples e WHERE e.content_type = 'WORD' AND e.content_id = w.id ) ORDER BY w.difficulty, w.id LIMIT #{limit}
